tool.name: build_attack_surface_review
tool.description: Build a coverage-first attack-surface review from the currently stored runtime inventory, mined artifacts, workflows, wrapped tool runs, session profiles, and assessment ledger. The report organizes assets from domain to object, flags blind spots as needs more data, classifies signals as confirmed/suspected/exposed-info/weak-signal/duplicate-risk/out-of-scope/blind-spot, and returns an attack-surface graph plus coverage ledger.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label whose stored assessment data should be synthesized into a layered attack-surface review.

parameter.name: scope_targets
parameter.description: Optional list of root domains, wildcard domains, hosts, or URLs used to seed scope normalization and scope-map v1.

parameter.name: max_tool_runs
parameter.description: Maximum number of stored wrapped-tool runs to ingest into the review. Default: 100.

parameter.name: max_session_profiles
parameter.description: Maximum number of stored session profiles to inspect when deriving role and boundary coverage. Default: 25.

parameter.name: max_nodes
parameter.description: Maximum number of graph nodes to return in the attack-surface graph. Default: 250.

parameter.name: max_edges
parameter.description: Maximum number of graph edges to return in the attack-surface graph. Default: 400.

parameter.name: max_priorities
parameter.description: Maximum number of top-priority targets, endpoints, hypotheses, chains, and blind spots to return per priority bucket. Default: 12.

tool.name: list_attack_surface_reviews
tool.description: List stored attack-surface review reports for the current root assessment context.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Optional logical target label. When provided, only the matching stored review is returned.

parameter.name: include_report
parameter.description: Whether to include the full stored report body in the response. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of stored review records to return. Default: 25.
